name: Nathania Anneta
description:
Nathania Anneta Wayak Payong — or just Neta — is honestly one of those people who can do it all. She's the main developer keeping Lyra Chic's website alive and running, but that's only half the story. Outside of her dev work, Nia is also an actress and model who took home the photogenic champion title of Kediri Regency in 2025. Yeah, she codes AND she slays.
With her rare mix of technical brain and creative soul, Nia is easily one of Lyra's most valuable pillars — and honestly, she's just getting started.

name: Carin Miracle
description:
Carin Miracle — stage name crshyle — is Lyra's resident dancer and a proud member of the dance team ST☆RGΛINZ along with Monique based in Kediri Regency, East Java. She's also Jessica Noleen's friend from the same school, which is honestly such a fun origin story.
She might not be the loudest in the room, but Carin has this quiet magnetism that draws people in. She placed 3rd in her school's dance contest in 2025, and those who've seen her move say she's got something special. Whatever's next for her in Lyra — we're watching. 👀
"I may not be the loudest, but when I move, I say everything I need to." — Carin
badges: 3rd place Winner of School Contest Dance 2025🏆🥉

name: Jessica Noleen Alka
description:
"I'm a gentle person on the outside, but I have a lot of ideas that I want to realize and share with others." — and honestly? That quote says everything about her.
Jessica Noleen Alka is a music producer, artist, and the owner of Lyra Chic itself. She's the one behind the original music and sound effects that give Lyra its unique vibe and feel. Her ability to create immersive audio experiences is something else — you don't just hear it, you feel it.
Gentle on the surface, but full of vision underneath. That's Noleen.

name: Monique Tri Tunggadewi
description:
Monique was actually Noleen and Carin's first friend at school — and it's easy to see why she left an impression. She's passionate about fashion, design, and all things creative, and those interests naturally found a home in Lyra Chic.
And yes — she's also part of the same dance group as Carin, ST☆RGΛINZ. So the creative chemistry between them? Totally makes sense.
As a fashion designer and creative illustrator, Monique brings a visual flair to the team that's hard to replicate. Whether it's a concept sketch or a full-on design, she puts her whole personality into it. Quietly expressive, endlessly creative.

name: Rhiannon Ava Mae
description:
Mae is the kind of person who lights up a room without even trying. At school, she's widely known as one of the most attractive girls around. It's not just looks though; it's the whole package. Noleen and Carin's second friend from school, she's known for her extroverted energy and that infectious laugh that somehow makes everything more fun.
As Lyra's performer and resident music enthusiast, Mae brings the hype and heart to the team. She's passionate about performing arts and entertainment, and when she's on — she's really on. If Lyra ever had a hype person, it'd be her.

name: Miracel Charis Gracia
description:
Charis is still a bit of a mystery — even to us. 🤫
What we do know is that she's Lyra's UI Tester, quietly making sure everything looks and feels right behind the scenes. She might not be in the spotlight yet, but something tells us that when her full story drops, it'll be worth the wait.
Stay tuned. ✨

name: Reagan Putra Lobis
description:
Reagan is Lyra Chic's co-developer and honestly one of the more grounded people on the team. At school, he's part of the student council's sports section — so yeah, he knows how to lead, how to organize, and how to keep things moving.
Those same skills carry right into Lyra. He's the kind of person you want in your corner when things get complicated — calm, reliable, and socially sharp. Behind the scenes, Reagan is doing more than most people realize.

name: Velanie Zerlina Agatha
description:
Velanie Agatha is another proud member of ST☆RGΛINZ — the same dance group as Carin and Monique — and honestly, the moment you see her, you understand why she fits right in. She carries this charming, almost magnetic presence that translates beautifully both on the dance floor and in fashion.
As a dancer and writer, Velanie brings a unique duality to Lyra Chic — she moves with grace and writes with intention. Her sense of style is expressive and illuminating, always turning heads without trying too hard.
"Even when the world feels dim, keep your light burning — because someone out there needs to see it." — Velanie ✨
